title: Melted Kenyan Fish Hash
description: A crispy, spicy, and savory dish that combines deep-fried fish, vegetables, and speculaas spice mix

ingredients.name: speculaas spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at Indian or African grocery stores

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F (180°C).
In a separate bowl, mix together speculaas spice mix, salt, and black pepper.
Dip fish pieces into the beaten egg for coating, then coat with the speculaas spice mix mixture.
Deep-fry fish pieces in batches until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per batch.
Remove fried fish from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
In the same oil, fry chopped onion, tomatoes, bell pepper, and cabbage until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add fried fish back into the pan and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Note: For a crispy top, sprinkle a small amount of coconut oil on top of the fish hash before serving.
